[2020-08-06 18:12] shadourow (Rando): I like Wild drones. Husk support some Really low econ build and barrier can be a nice green sink in some high econ set

[2020-08-06 18:12] iminabearsuit: Your opponent might try to sync isos, and give you a win.

[2020-08-06 18:13] shadourow (Rando): But sure, Isos aren't great

[2020-08-06 18:13] shadourow (Rando): While wild drone at least enable some better econ openings

[2020-08-06 18:15] shadourow (Rando): Iso can build some nice tooth indeed
[2020-08-06 18:15] iminabearsuit: 20 gausscannons is not the reason im going breach proof. The only way I would see it helping, is if each gold is valuable, so something like 11 drone conduit spam.
[2020-08-06 18:16] iminabearsuit: Arms Race is also pretty bad. It's better than base set in high econ. But a set is never high econ because of arms race. So all it does is speed up a game thats already high econ.

--- Thread (50 messages, 2020-08-06 to 2020-08-07) ---
[2020-08-06 23:43] iminabearsuit: Whats the lowest amount of damage you'll absorb on Colossus in order to buy a new one?

I.e. Opponent has 3-7 damage, you have 2 engis 8 hp colossus 15 drones. Do you take the suboptimal absorb, or buy Wall double tarsier?
[2020-08-06 23:44] iminabearsuit: No assumtions about the rest of the game, which makes it a dumb question. But at what point do you feel sub optimal, and at what point do you feel really bad that it's the correct play.
[2020-08-06 23:46] .bky_1556 (bky): No assumptions about the rest of the game? I could see holding it to soak a single damage in a frontline corner case.
[2020-08-06 23:47] velizar_ (Name): Technically, a non absorbing Colossus is actually better than base set attackers, assuming that you already have RRGBB
[2020-08-06 23:47] velizar_ (Name): Very slightly better than 2 splitters plus whatever
[2020-08-06 23:49] velizar_ (Name): So it depends on what other units are available to buy. If there's already good soak and strong attackers, that rivals Colossus.
[2020-08-06 23:50] velizar_ (Name): Suppose there's Cynestra and Aegis
[2020-08-06 23:50] iminabearsuit: Is there anything that can come close to colossus if you have the resources?
[2020-08-06 23:51] velizar_ (Name): Also note that holding colossus costs you 3 attack, so your opponent must have at least 5 attack for this to have any point most of the time, assuming you have wall.
[2020-08-06 23:51] iminabearsuit: The assumtion was no wall.
[2020-08-06 23:52] iminabearsuit: As in, not holding colossus and buying a new one, would involve getting breached.
[2020-08-06 23:52] iminabearsuit: Yeah, you dont have one. You can buy one.
[2020-08-06 23:52] iminabearsuit: But that would be skipping a turn on Colossus.
[2020-08-06 23:53] iminabearsuit: I believe the answer is "do whatever you need to do, to buy all 4"
[2020-08-06 23:53] iminabearsuit: My experience is that, skipping a turn on colossus, makes it really hard to get the 4th one.
[2020-08-06 23:55] .bky_1556 (bky): If my colossus is putting 3 damage into an opposing colossus, that's different from putting 3 damage into a wall.
[2020-08-06 23:57] iminabearsuit: Yeah, I mean its a dumb question. Since there's a thousand factors that should influence the decision in a real game.

It's more a vibe question about at what point you just feel really sad about having to hold it.
[2020-08-06 23:58] .bky_1556 (bky): In general, anything less than 5.
[2020-08-06 23:58] lyra1712 (Lyra): i feel holding colossus to buy colossus is good more often that my intuition would think
[2020-08-06 23:58] lyra1712 (Lyra): if that makes any sense
[2020-08-06 23:58] iminabearsuit: I believe so as well.
[2020-08-06 23:59] iminabearsuit: I would hate absorbing only 3. But I can imagine that being correct.
[2020-08-06 23:59] iminabearsuit: ALthough at 3, you can hold it another turn for 4.
[2020-08-06 23:59] lyra1712 (Lyra): id rather do that than buy WTT and waste blue for instance
[2020-08-07 00:00] anesotericman (Esoteric): the other part of the equation is how much the defense matters (what some call tempo)
[2020-08-07 00:00] anesotericman (Esoteric): if the colossus overdefends and gets 6 absorb, that's often incorrect
[2020-08-07 00:00] anesotericman (Esoteric): but sometimes it could be right to hold it and not get any absorb, if you really needed 8 defense that turn
[2020-08-07 00:01] iminabearsuit: My assumtion is that its a colossus mirror. So the game would scale from the original damage by 3 a turn.
[2020-08-07 00:02] anesotericman (Esoteric): anyway, my rule of thumb would be if you can defend with a wall and a forcefield, defend with the wall and forcefield
[2020-08-07 00:02] anesotericman (Esoteric): but I'm sure there's lots of exceptions
[2020-08-07 00:02] anesotericman (Esoteric): mainly around wasting tech or tempo stuff
[2020-08-07 00:03] anesotericman (Esoteric): which is frequent enough that the exceptions might be the rule, due to the awkwardness of the tech. hmm
[2020-08-07 00:04] iminabearsuit: Depends on drone count as well. Youre never dropping below 15 drones if you wanna buy colossus multiple turns in a row.
[2020-08-07 00:04] anesotericman (Esoteric): okay, how about: try not to absorb 1-5 damage on a colossus
[2020-08-07 00:04] anesotericman (Esoteric): 0, 6, and 7 are fine
[2020-08-07 00:05] iminabearsuit: I would probably favor the person that buys colossus every turn, and get 3 absorb on his first one. Versus the guy that ended up building a wall that wont die for 3 turns.
[2020-08-07 00:06] anesotericman (Esoteric): well, the flip side is if you end up buying a col that doesn't get absorb for 4 turns, right?
[2020-08-07 00:06] lyra1712 (Lyra): yeah, if the absorber you buy just sits around doing nothing for multiple turns, its probably not worth it
[2020-08-07 00:06] iminabearsuit: Colossus is a decent attacker.
[2020-08-07 00:06] lyra1712 (Lyra): id just take the lowish colossus absorb
[2020-08-07 00:07] anesotericman (Esoteric): col is weaker than tarsier by a decent amount if it's just an attacker
[2020-08-07 00:07] anesotericman (Esoteric): need the defense value
[2020-08-07 00:07] iminabearsuit: Well, we're assuming tech is bought.
[2020-08-07 00:07] lyra1712 (Lyra): even though its somewhat true, it also spends blue that has no good attackers
[2020-08-07 00:07] lyra1712 (Lyra): so it often ends up quite a bit better than Ts
[2020-08-07 00:08] anesotericman (Esoteric): it depends on what you spend your blue on, yeah
[2020-08-07 00:09] anesotericman (Esoteric): but from a raw efficiency perspective: Colossus costs...what, 21.66 for 3 damage
[2020-08-07 00:09] anesotericman (Esoteric): tarsier is 15 + a turn's inflation for the same
[2020-08-07 00:09] lyra1712 (Lyra): id argue thats misleading in most cases
[2020-08-07 00:09] iminabearsuit: That doesnt really work in a situation where you already have a colossus.
